_meta.description: Champion ('winner') scoring table. Points awarded to a player whose champion pick wins WC 2026.
_meta.rule: Official organizer table. Favorite (France) = 20 pts, biggest surprise = 60 pts.
_meta.source: Official competition scoring table (provided by organizer, 2026-06-16)
_meta.note: AUTHORITATIVE. Replaces the earlier odds-derived estimate; hand-keyed from the organizer's table.
